title: Construct low-profile timber or modular retaining walls
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct low-profile timber or modular retaining walls demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare work

pcs.text: Read work instructions relating to constructing the retaining wall and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read work instructions relating to constructing the retaining wall and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read work instructions relating to constructing the retaining wall and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Check and confirm quantity and quality of materials according to job plan requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and confirm quantity and quality of materials according to job plan requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and confirm quantity and quality of materials according to job plan requirements.

pcs.text: Identify manual handling and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify manual handling and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify manual handling and workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Locate and mark out services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and mark out services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and mark out services.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare work

elements.title: Mark out site for retaining wall

pcs.text: Mark out position of retaining wall according to site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark out position of retaining wall according to site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out position of retaining wall according to site plan.

pcs.text: Determine location and depth of excavations according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine location and depth of excavations according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine location and depth of excavations according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Establish profiles according to designated tolerances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish profiles according to designated tolerances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish profiles according to designated tolerances.

pcs.text: Establish survey benchmarks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish survey benchmarks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish survey benchmarks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Mark out site for retaining wall

elements.title: Prepare footings according to industry standards

pcs.text: Excavate retaining wall foundations to required depth and dimensions according to site plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Excavate retaining wall foundations to required depth and dimensions according to site plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate retaining wall foundations to required depth and dimensions according to site plans.

pcs.text: Remove and stockpile soil and waste material to ensure a safe working area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and stockpile soil and waste material to ensure a safe working area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and stockpile soil and waste material to ensure a safe working area.

pcs.text: Locate reinforcing or steps in excavated site and position accordingly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate reinforcing or steps in excavated site and position accordingly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate reinforcing or steps in excavated site and position accordingly.

pcs.text: Position pegs to maintain levels of even depth and horizontal plane to the top of footings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position pegs to maintain levels of even depth and horizontal plane to the top of footings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position pegs to maintain levels of even depth and horizontal plane to the top of footings.

pcs.text: Place, consolidate and finish footings to determined levels, to ensure coverage of reinforcement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place, consolidate and finish footings to determined levels, to ensure coverage of reinforcement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place, consolidate and finish footings to determined levels, to ensure coverage of reinforcement.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare footings according to industry standards

elements.title: Prepare and install retaining wall components

pcs.text: Prepare and lay out components for installation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and lay out components for installation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and lay out components for installation.

pcs.text: Mark components to be cut to length and shape, and cut to requirements of profiles already established
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark components to be cut to length and shape, and cut to requirements of profiles already established?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark components to be cut to length and shape, and cut to requirements of profiles already established.

pcs.text: Construct base layer of retaining wall to point above the top of drainage media and form weep holes where indicated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct base layer of retaining wall to point above the top of drainage media and form weep holes where indicated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct base layer of retaining wall to point above the top of drainage media and form weep holes where indicated.

pcs.text: Install protective membrane as specified in site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install protective membrane as specified in site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install protective membrane as specified in site plan.

pcs.text: Install drainage media and material as specified in site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install drainage media and material as specified in site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install drainage media and material as specified in site plan.

pcs.text: Back-fill and compact fill material behind base of retaining wall
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Back-fill and compact fill material behind base of retaining wall?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Back-fill and compact fill material behind base of retaining wall.

pcs.text: Construct retaining wall components to required dimensions, profiles and levels as specified on site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct retaining wall components to required dimensions, profiles and levels as specified on site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct retaining wall components to required dimensions, profiles and levels as specified on site plan.

pcs.text: Set capping to top of retaining wall to specified levels with tolerance appropriate to style of capping
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set capping to top of retaining wall to specified levels with tolerance appropriate to style of capping?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set capping to top of retaining wall to specified levels with tolerance appropriate to style of capping.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Prepare and install retaining wall components
